title: helianthemum alyssoides var. rugosum
intro: Helianthemum alyssoides var. rugosum, also known as rough rockrose, is a variety of flowering plant in the Cistaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helianthemum alyssoides var. rugosum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
